items.title: Four dead and dozens injured after massive Russian strikes across Ukraine
items.dek: Thousands of Kyiv residents ran for shelter following what officials said were ballistic missile strikes on the city centre.
items.body: Thousands of Kyiv residents ran for shelter following what officials said were ballistic missile strikes on the city centre.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Denmark's Mette Frederiksen to form government after months of negotiations
items.dek: The leader of Denmark's Social Democratic Party is forming a centre-left coalition minority government, giving her a third term as prime minister.
items.body: The leader of Denmark's Social Democratic Party is forming a centre-left coalition minority government, giving her a third term as prime minister.
items.author: IriLine Desk
